extensionShortName.description: The short name of the extension

extensionDescription.message: चयनित टेक्स्ट या पूरे पेज के टेक्स्ट का विश्लेषण करें और विस्तृत आँकड़े प्रदर्शित करें।
extensionDescription.description: The description of the extension shown in the Chrome Web Store and extensions page

extensionTitle.description: The tooltip title shown when hovering the extension icon

popupHeading.description: Main heading displayed at the top of the popup

popupSubheading.description: Subheading displayed below the main heading in the popup

toggleFullPage.description: Label for the toggle button that switches to full-page analysis mode

toggleSelection.description: Label for the toggle button that switches to selected-text analysis mode

modeSelected.description: Status badge text shown when the extension is analyzing the selected text

modeFullPage.description: Status badge text shown when the extension is analyzing the full page text

spinnerLabel.message: टेक्स्ट का विश्लेषण हो रहा है…
spinnerLabel.description: Accessible label and visible text shown next to the loading spinner

statCharactersWithSpaces.description: Label for the character count statistic that includes spaces

statCharactersNoSpaces.description: Label for the character count statistic that excludes spaces

statWords.description: Label for the total word count statistic

statSentences.description: Label for the total sentence count statistic

statParagraphs.description: Label for the total paragraph count statistic

statReadingTime.description: Label for the estimated reading time statistic

statUniqueWords.description: Label for the unique word count statistic

statLongestWord.description: Label for the longest word found in the text

readingTimeMinutes.description: Formatted reading time value. $MINUTES$ is replaced with the number of minutes.

readingTimeLessThanHalf.description: Reading time label shown when the text is very short (less than half a minute)

noTextFound.message: इस पेज पर कोई पढ़ने योग्य टेक्स्ट नहीं मिला।
noTextFound.description: Message shown when the extension cannot find any text to analyze

errorGeneric.message: इस पेज का विश्लेषण नहीं किया जा सकता। कोई दूसरा टैब आज़माएँ।
errorGeneric.description: Generic error message shown when the extension fails to access or analyze the page

errorRestrictedPage.message: इस पेज का विश्लेषण नहीं किया जा सकता (प्रतिबंधित URL)।
errorRestrictedPage.description: Error message shown when the extension tries to run on a restricted browser page such as chrome:// or the Web Store

noSelectionFallback.message: कोई टेक्स्ट चयनित नहीं — पूरे पेज के आँकड़े दिखाए जा रहे हैं।
noSelectionFallback.description: Informational notice shown when the user has no text selected and the extension falls back to full-page analysis

footerNote.message: पढ़ने की गति: 200 शब्द प्रति मिनट
footerNote.description: Small footer note explaining the reading speed assumption used for the reading time calculation

copyButton.description: Label for the button that copies the statistics to the clipboard

copySuccess.description: Temporary feedback message shown after the stats have been successfully copied to the clipboard

copyError.description: Temporary feedback message shown when copying to the clipboard fails

zeroValue.description: Displayed value when a statistic is zero

noneValue.description: Displayed value when a statistic has no applicable result, such as the longest word when there are no words
